title: pouzolzia weddellii var. humbertii
intro: Pouzolzia weddellii var. humbertii is a variety of the Pouzolzia weddellii plant, a type of flowering plant in the nettle family (Urticaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Madagascar, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pouzolzia weddellii var. humbertii has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
